# Product Hunt Listing

## Tagline (60 chars max)
Get your brand cited by ChatGPT, Claude & Gemini

## Short Description
CitedBy.ai is the first platform for AI Engine Optimization (AEO). Audit your AI visibility score, monitor how AI bots crawl your site, and use 15+ tools to optimize your content so ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, and Gemini recommend your brand. Free audit included.

## Topics
- Artificial Intelligence
- SEO
- Marketing
- SaaS

- Twitter: https://twitter.com/citedbyai

content.text: Now let me create the maker comment template:

input.content:
# Maker Comment Template

---

Hi Product Hunt! 👋

I discovered something jarring last year: my website was invisible to AI. While my competitors appeared in ChatGPT, Claude, and Perplexity recommendations, mine didn't—even though we ranked high on Google.

That's when I realized AI visibility is a completely different game from SEO. AI bots crawl differently, index differently, and recommend based on different signals. So I built **CitedBy.ai**—the first platform for AI Engine Optimization (AEO).

## What CitedBy.ai Does

**Audit** — Get your AI Visibility Score in 2 minutes. See exactly how AI bots see your website and where you're losing citations.

**Monitor** — Track which AI bots visit your site, when they crawl, and what they extract. Real-time dashboards show you competitive benchmarks.

**Optimize** — Use our 15+ generative tools to create AI-optimized content, metadata, and structured data. Built-in recommendations tell you exactly what to fix.

We've helped 200+ companies go from invisible to recommended across ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, and Gemini. The results speak for themselves—companies see 40-60% increases in AI citations within 30 days.

**The best part?** We're giving away free AI visibility audits to Product Hunt. No credit card required. You'll get a detailed report showing:
- Your AI Visibility Score
- Comparison to competitors
- Step-by-step optimization roadmap
- Which AI bots found you (and which didn't)

**Reply with your website URL and I'll personally run a full AI visibility audit for you.** 🚀

---

content.text: Now let me create the gallery plan:

input.content:
# Product Hunt Gallery Plan

## Image Specifications
- **Main images**: 1270x760px, dark theme (#0f0f0f to #1a1a1a background)
- **Thumbnail**: 240x240px, CitedBy.ai logo on dark gradient background
- **Format**: PNG or WebP (optimize for web)
- **Typography**: Montserrat Bold for headlines, Inter Regular for body
- **Color palette**: Primary: #7c3aed (purple), Accent: #06b6d4 (cyan), Success: #10b981 (green)

---

## Image 1: Hero Dashboard
**Title**: AI Visibility Dashboard with Score Ring

**Visual Elements**:
- Large circular score ring (animated effect) in center showing "72/100"
- Ring color gradient: Green (#10b981) to Yellow to Red
- Dashboard behind ring showing:
  - "AI Visibility Score" label
  - "ChatGPT Citations: 23"
  - "Claude Citations: 18"
  - "Perplexity Citations: 15"
  - "Gemini Citations: 19"
- Subtle grid background with data points
- Text overlay: "See How AI Bots See You"

**Design Notes**: Premium, enterprise feel. Emphasis on the main metric (score). Use glassmorphism for card elements.

---

## Image 2: AI Bot Monitoring
**Title**: AI Bot Monitoring with Tracking Table

**Visual Elements**:
- Table with 4 columns: "Bot Name", "Last Crawl", "Pages Indexed", "Extract Rate"
- Rows showing:
  - GPTBot | 2 hours ago | 127 pages | 89%
  - ClaudeBot | 4 hours ago | 142 pages | 94%
  - PerplexityBot | 1 day ago | 98 pages | 76%
  - GeminiBot | 3 hours ago | 134 pages | 91%
- Color-coded status indicators (green checkmarks for active, yellow for slow)
- Timeline graph on right side showing crawl frequency over past 7 days
- Text overlay: "Monitor AI Bot Activity in Real-Time"

**Design Notes**: Professional data visualization. Clean typography for readability. Subtle animations suggest real-time updates.

---

## Image 3: Generative Tools Suite
**Title**: 15+ Optimization Tools Showcase

**Visual Elements**:
- Grid layout (3x2 or similar) showing tool icons with labels:
  - Meta Tag Generator
  - FAQ Schema Creator
  - Content Optimizer
  - Heading Restructurer
  - Citation Builder
  - Internal Linking Suggester
  - Structured Data Validator
  - Competitor Analyzer
  - AI Readability Scorer
  - Keyword Density Checker
  - Content Audit Tool
  - Bot-Friendly Sitemap Generator
  - Rich Snippet Creator
  - Entity Extractor
  - Recommendation Booster
- Each tool icon should use a distinct color from the palette
- Text overlay: "15+ AI-Powered Optimization Tools"

**Design Notes**: Show abundance and capability. Icon-based design for quick recognition. Emphasize breadth of solution.

---

## Image 4: Before/After Comparison
**Title**: Invisible vs Recommended

**Visual Elements**:
- Split-screen design (vertical or diagonal split)

**Left side (Before - Invisible)**:
- Red tint overlay (#ef4444)
- Dashboard showing "AI Visibility Score: 18/100"
- Large red X icon
- Text: "Invisible to AI Bots"
- Sample of website cards with "NOT RECOMMENDED" badges
- ChatGPT/Claude/Perplexity logos with X marks

**Right side (After - Recommended)**:
- Green tint overlay (#10b981)
- Dashboard showing "AI Visibility Score: 78/100"
- Large green checkmark icon
- Text: "Recommended by AI"
- Sample of website cards with "RECOMMENDED" badges
- ChatGPT/Claude/Perplexity logos with checkmarks
- "40-60% increase in AI citations" metric

**Design Notes**: Stark contrast between before and after. Emotional impact of transformation. Clear visual hierarchy showing improvement.

---

## Image 5: Demo GIF (15-second audit flow)
**Title**: 15-Second Audit Flow Walkthrough

**Sequence** (each frame ~2 seconds):
1. **Frame 1**: User typing URL into search box (input field animated)
   - Text: "1. Enter Your Website"
   
2. **Frame 2**: Loading animation with progress bar
   - Text: "2. CitedBy.ai Audits Your Site"
   - Show scanning visual (waves moving across screen)
   
3. **Frame 3**: Results populating on dashboard
   - Text: "3. Instant AI Visibility Report"
   - Cards filling in with metrics (staggered animation)
   
4. **Frame 4**: Score ring animating to final value
   - Text: "4. Get Your Score"
   - Ring fills from 0 to 72 with counter
   
5. **Frame 5**: Recommendations appearing
   - Text: "5. Start Optimizing"
   - Tool cards appearing in grid
   
6. **Frame 6**: Final frame showing all elements with CTA
   - Text: "Free Audit in 2 Minutes"
   - Button: "Get Started"

**Design Notes**: Smooth transitions between frames. Maintain dark theme throughout. Use color highlights to draw attention to changes. Fast-paced to feel snappy and efficient.

---

## Thumbnail Specification
**Size**: 240x240px

**Design**:
- Dark gradient background: #0f0f0f (top) to #1a1a2e (bottom)
- CitedBy.ai logo centered (preferably 120x120px)
- Subtle accent elements:
  - Small purple circle (#7c3aed) top-right corner
  - Small cyan circle (#06b6d4) bottom-left corner
- Clean, minimal design
- Logo should be easily recognizable even at small size

**Variations** (optional):
- Version with "Free Audit" text badge
- Version with upward arrow accent
- Version with score ring element

---

## Production Checklist

- [ ] Export all images at correct dimensions
- [ ] Compress for web (target <500KB per main image)
- [ ] Test images on Product Hunt preview
- [ ] Ensure text is readable at thumbnail size
- [ ] Verify color accuracy across browsers
- [ ] Check mobile preview rendering
- [ ] Create GIF with 30fps, <3MB file size
- [ ] Optimize PNG/WebP compression
- [ ] Add alt text to all images
- [ ] Review brand consistency across all assets

## Summary

**File 1: listing.md**

- Topics, pricing tier, and official links

**File 2: maker-comment.md**

- Free audit offer with closing call-to-action inviting users to reply with their website URL

**File 3: gallery-plan.md**
- Complete specifications for 5 high-impact images (1270x760px dark theme)
  - **Image 1**: Hero dashboard with AI Visibility Score ring (72/100)
  - **Image 2**: AI Bot monitoring table tracking GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, GeminiBot
  - **Image 3**: 15-tool grid showcasing optimization suite
  - **Image 4**: Before/After visual comparison (18→78 score improvement)
  - **Image 5**: Animated GIF showing 15-second audit flow (6 frames)
- Thumbnail specification (240x240px, logo on gradient)
- Design system with color palette, typography, and production checklist

All files are ready for your Product Hunt launch. No commits were made as requested.
